'''âl-l-y-k''' ('''kalalyekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrostun|electrostun]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrostun|electrostun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-l-y-k
|-
! Lemma
| kalalyekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilalyekoko|thilalyekoko]] || [[word:jilalyekoko|jilalyekoko]] || [[word:shilalyekoko|shilalyekoko]] || [[word:kilalyekoko|kilalyekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulalyekoko|thuthulalyekoko]] || [[word:jujulalyekoko|jujulalyekoko]] || [[word:shushulalyekoko|shushulalyekoko]] || [[word:kukulalyekoko|kukulalyekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholalyekoko|tholalyekoko]] || [[word:jolalyekoko|jolalyekoko]] || [[word:sholalyekoko|sholalyekoko]] || [[word:kolalyekoko|kolalyekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
